steps.t: As Rook's avanc is his steed of sorts, whistling might be a good way to call him. The avanc can be found under Rook to the west of Snowbourn.
Whistling didn't prove helpful, so perhaps a more direct approach would work. The avanc can be found under Rook to the west of Snowbourn.
The avanc can be found under Rook to the west of Snowbourn.
Rook can be found to the west of Snowbourn.
